title: creative_treatment.json — the director's creative treatment (prompt-expansion)
description: v1.0. A grounded creative-direction layer produced AFTER research and BEFORE the script, on the strong creative model, distilled from the HyperFrames craft library. It enriches a thin brief into an intentional production direction (rhythm, visual world, per-beat concept/mood/emphasis, recurring motifs) that BOTH the scriptwriter and the art director read the same way — so they use the full closed vocabulary deliberately instead of defaulting to restraint. It is DIRECTION ONLY: no pixel coordinates, no freeform per-scene decoratives, nothing outside the agents' closed vocabularies. All fields beyond schema_version are advisory and OPTIONAL, so the pipeline stays backward-compatible when the stage is absent.

mood_refs.description: cultural/design references (NOT hex), e.g. 'editorial calm', 'cinematic title sequence'

motifs.description: recurring visual threads across the video

emphasis.description: the one idea the whole video must land

beats.description: per narrative beat (derived from the brief's arc), in order

concept.description: the big idea of this beat in 1-2 sentences

mood.description: the felt tone / energy of this beat

emphasis_word.description: the single word/phrase that should land
